task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL (e.g., 's3://my-bucket.us-west-2.amazonaws.com'). The function should return just the region code.
Create a JSON object representing an IAM policy that allows read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.

Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS IAM role names. Role names must start with a letter, contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores, and be between 1 and 64 characters long.
